author: Rubric Labs
description: A local proxy that juggles rate limits across your Codex and Claude Code accounts — with live token-throughput analytics.
name: tokenmaxx

scripts.build: bun run clean && bun build ./src/index.ts --target bun --outdir dist --external '@opentui/*' && cp bin/launcher.cjs dist/launcher.cjs && chmod 755 dist/index.js dist/launcher.cjs
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun x biome check . && bun test
scripts.prepare: git config core.hooksPath .git/hooks && bun x simple-git-hooks

simple-git-hooks.post-commit: [ -n "$AMENDING" ] || { bun -e 'const f=Bun.file("package.json");const p=await f.json();const v=p.version.split(".").map(Number);v[2]++;p.version=v.join(".");await Bun.write(f,JSON.stringify(p,null,"\t")+"\n")' && git add package.json && AMENDING=1 git commit --amend --no-verify --no-edit; }
